prompt: Vertical portrait 9:16 high-resolution atlas world map for a D&D 5e Forgotten Realms inspired heroic high fantasy RPG setting. Terrain type: single_continent. Draw one immense fictional continent in illustrated fantasy world map style, cartographic parchment, Tolkien-esque but original. Include rolling hills, deep ancient forests, jagged mountain ranges, scattered dungeon entrances, frontier towns and hamlets, winding rivers, coastal harbors, magical rune stones, ancient ruins, wizard towers, dragon lairs, noble roads, sacred temples, dwarven holds, elven woods, and monster-haunted wilderness. The continent must span many climates and biomes: temperate kingdoms, snowy mountains, arid deserts, tropical jungles, misty swamps, volcanic badlands, tundra, grasslands, river valleys, and stormy coasts. Coastline must be realistic and complex with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, river deltas, fjords, barrier islands, sea caves, and varied landforms. Include irregular offshore islands in uneven clusters, all different sizes and shapes, some with ruins, temples, and monster lairs. Large detailed atlas composition, ornate compass rose and fantasy border allowed, no readable labels, no legible text, no logos, no modern satellite style.
